description: Morning task synthesis from notes in the user-defined `morning-plan` path set. Reviews only files the user has explicitly added to that path set — does not scan the workspace broadly.
task:
Review the user's notes from the saved `morning-plan` path set. Synthesize a short list of likely priorities for today. Prioritize repeated themes, deadlines, and work that looks time-sensitive. Keep it to 3-5 items max.

Files:
{{paths:morning-plan}}

Format: a quick warm rundown, concise, with bullets only if they make the result clearer.
